# best

My life-optimization workspace: a meta-repo of mostly plain folders (browse them right
here) plus a few nested folders that are separate Git repos, not submodules. Those
sub-repos are listed below — git can't reach across a nested `.git`, so their files live
behind the links, not in this repo.

The table is regenerated from `repos.yaml` by `.workspace/sync-repos.py`; run it after
adding or removing a nested repo.

<!-- BEGIN managed repo map -->
<!-- Generated by .workspace/sync-repos.py from repos.yaml. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Sub-repositories

These folders are separate Git repos, not tracked here — git can't reach across a nested `.git`, so open a link to see a folder's files. (Private links 404 without access.)

| Folder | Visibility | Repository |
|---|---|---|
| `friends/advice/` | 🔒 private | [alejoacelas/advice](https://github.com/alejoacelas/advice) |
| `friends/partner/` | 🔒 private | [alejoacelas/partner](https://github.com/alejoacelas/partner) |
| `friends/people/` | 🔒 private | [alejoacelas/people](https://github.com/alejoacelas/people) |
| `friends/places/visa/` | 🔒 private | [alejoacelas/visa](https://github.com/alejoacelas/visa) |
| `machine/dotfiles/` | public | [alejoacelas/dotfiles](https://github.com/alejoacelas/dotfiles) |
| `make/art/meals/` | public | [alejoacelas/meals](https://github.com/alejoacelas/meals) |
| `make/tools/` | 🔒 private | [alejoacelas/tools](https://github.com/alejoacelas/tools) |
| `make/writing/blog/` | public | [alejoacelas/myea-blog](https://github.com/alejoacelas/myea-blog) |
<!-- END managed repo map -->
